summary: Implementation is correct, complete, and properly tested. All validation contract assertions pass.

VAL-CLOSEOUT-001.notes: Reviewer-wait blocker correctly recorded when worker_done completes with no idle reviewer

VAL-CLOSEOUT-002.notes: closeoutBlocker shows reviewer-wait when in_review with worker_done but no reviewer run

VAL-CLOSEOUT-003.notes: closeoutBlocker is null when reviewer run exists (blocker clears on successful reviewer wake)

VAL-CLOSEOUT-004.notes: closeoutBlocker is null after reviewer-verdict recorded

sharedStateObservations.observation: The company-run-chain blocker pattern uses activity events (reviewer_wake_deferred) combined with run state to derive blockers without additional DB storage
sharedStateObservations.rationale: This derived truth pattern for closeout blockers should be documented for future feature work

sharedStateObservations.observation: server/src/routes/issues.ts contains buildCompanyRunChainBlocker() which is the central location for computing all closeout blockers
sharedStateObservations.rationale: New blockers should extend this function following the established pattern
